Name: Grumpy Tiger LA Mousse Hash | Mohawk Medibles
Description:
Grumpy Tiger LA Mousse Hash brings together elite California genetics, French Touch texture, and serious potency in one refined concentrate. To begin with, this strain—also known as Cowboy Cookies—is grown by Snowtill in San Francisco and is famous for its sweet, gassy dessert aroma and very high THC levels.

Right away, the effects make their presence known 🧠⚡. First, the mind lifts into a calm yet energized state, easing stress while sharpening awareness. Soon after, a deeper relaxation settles in, grounding the body without knocking you out. Because of this balance, Grumpy Tiger works well for experienced users who enjoy intensity without losing control.

As the session continues, the experience can feel immersive and introspective 🌌. Many users describe enhanced visuals, deeper thought patterns, and a strong sense of presence. At the same time, the body stays relaxed and comfortable, making this hash ideal for late-day sessions, creative exploration, or intentional downtime.

Meanwhile, the flavour profile keeps things rich and indulgent 🍪⛽. Sweet cookie notes lead the way, followed closely by creamy dessert tones and a bold gassy finish. Underneath it all, subtle earthy and spicy notes round out the smoke, keeping every pull smooth and full-bodied.

Because this is LA Mousse Hash, the texture remains light, fluffy, and aerated. As a result, it’s easy to work with, melts cleanly, and delivers consistent flavour whether mixed with flower, rolled, or gently heated.
